nasb.text: If her father absolutely refuses to give her to him, he shall pay money equal to the dowry for virgins.

esv.text: If her father utterly refuses to give her to him, he shall pay money equal to the bride-price for virgins.

cnv.text: 如果處女的父親堅決不肯把女兒嫁給他，他就要按照處女的聘禮，交出聘銀來。

ccb.text: 倘若女方家长反对婚事，男方要付出相当于聘礼的金钱给女方家长。
